mission.title: vault: PROXY Protocol v2 logging support
mission.description: PROXY Protocol v2 logging support. Requested by 12+ users.

steps.title: Check current vault setup
steps.description:
Verify your vault version and configuration:
```bash
vault version
```
This feature requires a working vault installation.

steps.title: Review vault configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant vault configuration:
**Feature Request:**

Vault currently supports using a client IP from a PROXY protocol header via the work done in #3098 and modified in #3195.

steps.title: Apply the fix for PROXY Protocol v2 logging support
steps.description:
I did not find tests for this so I added one trying to cover different
configurations to make sure I did not break something. As far as I know,
the behavior should be exactly the same as before except for one thing
when proxy_protocol_behavior is set to "deny_unauthorized", unauthorized
requests were previously silently reject because of https://github.com/armon/go-proxyproto/blob/7e956b284f0a/protocol.go#L81-L84
but it will now be logged.

Also fixes

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "PROXY Protocol v2 logging support" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
I did not find tests for this so I added one trying to cover different
configurations to make sure I did not break something.

prerequisites.description: A working vault installation or development environment.
